### Post by dannymichel on 2009-08-09
double clicking '298gb music (a)' opens '298gb music (b)', double clicking '298gb music (b)' opens '931GB Music', double clicking '596gb music' opens '298GB Music (a)', double clicking 931gb music' opens '596GB Music'

[[IMG]http://thumbnails19.imagebam.com/4487/9a127d44860057.gif[/IMG]](http://www.imagebam.com/image/9a127d44860057)

here is my fstab
```
# /etc/fstab: static file system information.
#
#  -- This file has been automatically generated by ntfs-config -- 
#
# <file system> <mount point>   <type>  <options>       <dump>  <pass>

proc /proc proc defaults 0 0
# Entry for /dev/sda1 :

# Entry for /dev/sda5 :
UUID=9bef33c5-7cfc-4067-8b29-29e9a15b2e8d none swap sw 0 0
/dev/scd0 /media/cdrom0 udf,iso9660 user,noauto,exec,utf8 0 0
/dev/fd0 /media/floppy0 auto rw,user,noauto,exec,utf8 0 0
/dev/sde1 /media/931GB\040Music ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
/dev/sdd1 /media/596GB\040Music ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
/dev/sdc1 /media/298GB\040Music\040(b) ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
/dev/sdb1 /media/298GB\040Music\040(a) ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
/dev/sda3 /media/Windows\0407 ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
/dev/sda2 /media/System\040Reserved ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
```

---

### Post by merlinus on 2009-08-09
Linux does not use backslashes, so that may be your problem.

Try changing one of the fstab entries to see if that makes a difference.

---

Try changing one of the fstab entries to see if that makes a difference.

To what?

### Post by michy99 on 2009-08-09
Enter this in  terminal:```
sudo mount -a
```You should get some error messages. Post those.

---

### Post by merlinus on 2009-08-09
This is a backslash

/dev/sde1 /media/931GB[COLOR=Red]\[/COLOR]040Music ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0

It is a windows separator.

You can edit fstab this way:

```
gksudo gedit /etc/fstab
```

---

### Post by michy99 on 2009-08-09
I see the problem. You are using the /dev/sdXX designations in fstab. These can change depending on the order in which your system finds the drives on start-up. You need to use the UUID designations instead. You can find them with```
sudo blkid
```

---

### Post by michy99 on 2009-08-09
Make a backup of fstab.```
sudo cp /etc/fstab /etc/fstab.backup
```
Open fstab for editing:```
gksudo gedit /etc/fstab
```Change these lines```
/dev/sde1 /media/931GB\040Music ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
/dev/sdd1 /media/596GB\040Music ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
/dev/sdc1 /media/298GB\040Music\040(b) ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
/dev/sdb1 /media/298GB\040Music\040(a) ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
/dev/sda3 /media/Windows\0407 ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
/dev/sda2 /media/System\040Reserved ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
```to this:```
UUID=1C5E047F5E045444 /media/931GB\040Music ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
UUID=88B61E84B61E7344 /media/596GB\040Music ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
UUID=628A4D268A4CF855 /media/298GB\040Music\040(b) ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
UUID=64982C1B982BE9EE /media/298GB\040Music\040(a) ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
UUID=C28052EA8052E487 /media/Windows\0407 ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
UUID=904245E84245D41E /media/System\040Reserved ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
```Save and reboot.

---

### Post by dannymichel on 2009-08-09
> **michy99 said:**
> Make a backup of fstab.```
sudo cp /etc/fstab /etc/fstab.backup
```
Open fstab for editing:```
gksudo gedit /etc/fstab
```Change these lines```
/dev/sde1 /media/931GB\040Music ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
/dev/sdd1 /media/596GB\040Music ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
/dev/sdc1 /media/298GB\040Music\040(b) ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
/dev/sdb1 /media/298GB\040Music\040(a) ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
/dev/sda3 /media/Windows\0407 ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
/dev/sda2 /media/System\040Reserved ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
```to this:```
UUID=1C5E047F5E045444 /media/931GB\040Music ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
UUID=88B61E84B61E7344 /media/596GB\040Music ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
UUID=628A4D268A4CF855 /media/298GB\040Music\040(b) ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
UUID=64982C1B982BE9EE /media/298GB\040Music\040(a) ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
UUID=C28052EA8052E487 /media/Windows\0407 ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
UUID=904245E84245D41E /media/System\040Reserved ntfs-3g defaults,locale=en_US.UTF-8 0 0
```Save and reboot.THANKS
that worked
